linting.notes: Pre-commit runs trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-added-large-files, check-merge-conflict, debug-statements, ruff-check, ruff-format, mypy, and pytest hooks. All linting commands validated successfully.

testing.mock_patterns: Fixtures provide sample evaluation data, sampling params, and config objects
testing.notes: All 10 tests are marked with @pytest.mark.integration_test. These tests require a running Llama Stack server, Kubeflow pipelines, and Ollama models. The non-integration test command collects 0 tests (exit code 5), which is treated as success by pre-commit. Integration tests cannot run in isolated container without external infrastructure.

ci.notes: CI runs on push to main/develop and pull_request branches. Uses Python 3.12 and uv 0.8.11. Pre-commit is the primary gating check that includes linting (ruff, mypy) and non-integration tests. Documentation workflow is separate and only triggers on doc changes.

build.notes: Project uses uv for dependency management and hatchling as build backend. The 'dev' extra includes all testing and linting tools. Node.js dependencies are only for documentation (Antora).

conventions.test_naming: Functions named test_*, all test files marked with pytestmark = pytest.mark.integration_test
conventions.notes: Tests are located in tests/ directory. conftest.py provides shared fixtures. All tests require external infrastructure (Llama Stack, Kubeflow, Ollama models). Python version pinned to >=3.12.

lint_commands.notes: All hooks passed (trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-added-large-files, check-merge-conflict, debug-statements, ruff-check, ruff-format, mypy, pytest)

test_commands.notes: Exit code 5 (no tests collected) - all 10 tests are marked as integration_test. This is expected and treated as success.
Requires Llama Stack server, Kubeflow, Ollama models. Fails with 'Invalid kube-config file. No configuration found.'

container_recipe.notes: Container validation successful for linting. All pre-commit checks pass. Tests require external Llama Stack server (default http://localhost:8321), Kubeflow pipelines, and Ollama models (granite3.3:2b, all-minilm:latest). Integration tests will fail in isolated container.
